_comment: Set magnetic declination in degrees. The descriptor declares `degrees`; this body forwards it to the Layer 0 command via a recipe parameter reference. Stack converters handle native units (ArduPilot radians, PX4 degrees) and perform PARAM_SET read-back validation.

then.detail: Compass declination write was accepted but read-back did not match the requested degrees value.
Compass declination parameter write was rejected by the autopilot.
Compass declination calibration cancelled by operator.
Compass declination calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
